item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Dalam Amerika Serikat, nilai individualisme memang menjadi bagian dari identitas sosial kami, tetapi ini tidak berarti kepentingan sosial tidak memiliki ruang.

notes: Agent A stays moderately pro-society with rights caveats. Agent B starts rights-first but moves toward balance/social responsibility while keeping individual rights as the foundation. Agent A turn 3 contains a CJK script artifact: "masyarakat整体".
